purpose: Accept a private link-registry capture from the iPhone Shortcut or TARS, authenticate it with a shared secret header, and delegate the durable write plus background processing enqueue to memory-api /registry/capture.
dependencies: Memory API Header Auth credential in n8n
Registry Webhook Header Auth credential in n8n
failureModes: missing or invalid registry secret header
notes: REG-01 performs the fast private ingress only; canonicalization and durable capture writes are delegated to memory-api.
The workflow should return immediately with success and must not wait for deep extraction or summarization to finish.
The shared secret header should be stable enough for iPhone Shortcut usage and private Tailnet routing.
